changes.reason: Pullback_long is the cleanest scalable active edge: 14 trades, $1129.1 PnL, 417.6 PnL/exposure hour, and only -138.25 worst MAE. Expanding the VWAP distance one grid step tests selective throughput recovery without touching global filters or stale-data routing.

Pullback_long median MFE is 102.1 with low tail risk versus other active profiles, so moving the fixed TP from 2 toward the 2.5 grid tests whether the profile can harvest more of its favorable excursion without changing entry logic.
Raise the profile-local dynamic TP cap from 4 to 5 so high-quality pullback winners are not capped too tightly; this pairs with the modest fixed TP increase while staying inside Batch C.

expected_effect: Should recover some profitable throughput and improve pullback_long PnL contribution while preserving its strong PnL/exposure profile. Main risk is longer holds from larger targets, so reject if total net profit stays below 98% of run_001, pullback_long PnL/exposure falls below roughly 300, or worst MAE worsens beyond -527.
label: promote
rationale: Use Batch C as a profile-local pullback throughput and reward-capture experiment. The latest run improved exposure efficiency but starved profit versus run_001; pullback_long is the best candidate for cautious expansion because it has the highest active-profile efficiency, materially lower worst MAE than charm_pin_pullback_long and breakout_long_1dte, and strong MFE support. This avoids the failed broad 1DTE tightening, call-wall loosening, fallback pruning, and runtime health-exit paths.

strategy_hypotheses.evidence: pullback_long produced $1129.1 over 14 VALID_0DTE trades, 417.6 PnL/exposure hour, median MFE 102.1, median hold 11.1 minutes, and worst MAE only -138.25, while latest total PnL remains $977.2 below run_001 despite slightly better PnL/exposure hour.
strategy_hypotheses.name: Pullback Throughput Re-Expansion
strategy_hypotheses.risk: Wider VWAP distance and larger TP may admit lower-quality pullbacks or extend hold time; reject if profile efficiency falls materially or total worst MAE worsens.
strategy_hypotheses.trigger: VALID_0DTE pullback_long entries with acceptable ES structure and pullback/reclaim behavior but slightly wider ES-VWAP distance than the current profile allows.
strategy_hypotheses.validation_metric: Total net profit returns toward run_001 with pullback_long PnL/exposure >=300, total pnl_per_exposure_hour flat or better versus run_001, trade count not down more than 10%, and worst MAE no worse than -527.

strategy_plan_reference.market_regime_read: The current sample is a favorable long-only, take-profit-only regime with 96 completed trades, 100% realized win rate, no >=12h slow trades, 0.4% drawdown, and $6148.6 PnL. The ...

new_strategy_ideas.name: 1DTE Pullback Companion
new_strategy_ideas.validation_metric: Combined 1DTE PnL >= current breakout_long_1dte PnL, 1DTE average MAE better than -123.7, total PnL >= 98% of leader, and no worse worst MAE.

new_strategy_ideas.name: Charm Pin Heat Classifier
new_strategy_ideas.validation_metric: Reduce charm_pin_pullback_long worst MAE toward <= -375 while retaining >=90% of charm-pin PnL and preserving fast winner count.

new_strategy_ideas.name: Call Wall Acceptance Micro-Sample Split
new_strategy_ideas.validation_metric: At least 5 trades, positive PnL, PnL/exposure hour >250, average MAE better than -60, and no total-score regression beyond 2%.

new_strategy_ideas.name: Dormant pullback_long_1dte Activation Probe
new_strategy_ideas.validation_metric: New profile adds or reallocates 1DTE trades with combined 1DTE PnL >= current $1304, better average MAE, and total score not worse than -2%.
